## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New probe
- [ ] New condition
- [ ] New analysis method
- [ ] Schema change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI, dependencies, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with zero errors
- [ ] If adding a probe: probe satisfies ethical invariance across all conditions
- [ ] If changing a probe or condition: I understand this breaks comparability with previous experimental results and have documented why the change is justified
- [ ] If adding a dependency: I've explained why the existing stack can't handle it

## Affiliation disclosure (if applicable)

Do you work for or have a financial relationship with any of the AI providers whose models are evaluated in SkynetBench? If yes, please disclose.

## Testing

How did you verify this change works?
